orderFailed: Could not create your order. Try again or contact support.
usdtOnlySubtitle: Challenge fees are collected in USDT only — no card or bank transfer.
usdtManualHint: Your order remains pending until our team confirms the on-chain deposit.
credentialsLine: You will receive your MT4/MT5 credentials by email within 15 minutes.
cryptoInstruction: Send exactly {amount} USDT (TRC20) to the address below:
cryptoWarning: Send only USDT TRC20. Other tokens or networks may result in permanent loss.
cryptoNote: After sending, click Confirm. Payment is verified automatically within 5–30 minutes.
bankNote: Include the exact reference number. Processing takes 1–3 business days.
legalAckBefore: By completing this purchase you agree to our
legalAcceptCheckbox: I confirm that I have read and agree to the Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, Refund Policy, and Risk Disclaimer, and that the Trading Rules at /rules govern my challenge.
legalAcceptRequired: Please tick the box to confirm the legal documents before completing checkout.

crypto.label: USDT (TRC-20)

secureSubtitle: TLS 1.2+ in transit · hardened payment form with masking (demo environment)
cardPreviewHint: Details are not sent to a real processor in this demo.
stripeCardOnly: When online card payments are enabled, complete checkout with card (Stripe).
stripeSessionFailed: Could not start Stripe Checkout. Try again or contact support.
stripeVerifyFailed: We could not confirm your payment. If you were charged, contact support with your receipt.
stripeCanceled: Checkout was canceled. You can try again when you are ready.
usdtAwaitingLine1: Send the exact amount in USDT (TRC20) using the instructions from the previous step.
usdtAwaitingLine2: After our team confirms your transfer on-chain, your challenge access will unlock.
usdtAwaitingLine3: MT4/MT5 login details are sent manually (email or support ticket) — usually within a few hours.
usdtActivatedToast: Your purchase is confirmed. You can open the dashboard.
usdtNotYetConfirmed: Not confirmed yet. If you already sent USDT, please wait for the team.
